description: Distinct nullifier used on Polygon (chainId=137) after a valid use of a different nullifier on Ethereum (chainId=1). With chain-scoped nullifier sets, each chain maintains its own nullifier registry. A fresh nullifier on a new chain should be accepted.

metadata.author: bolyra-conformance
metadata.notes: Different nullifier hash from cv_11/cv_12. Chain-scoped nullifier set means Polygon's registry is independent. This is a valid first-use on chain 137.
